gate_trigger.tie_breaker: when size and consequence disagree, judge by consequence

low.example: small reversible commit on a feature branch

medium.example: push to a shared branch; routine deploy

high.example: migration, delete, force-push, prod config, anything irreversible

amplifiers_that_raise_tier: human moving faster than they are reading

question_contract.must_be_anchored: references this repo's real symbols, files, schema, callers
question_contract.anchor_test: a model with no access to this repo must NOT be able to answer it
question_contract.must_target: consequences and blast radius, not definitions or trivia
must_not: be guessable from its own text
question_contract.only_ask_if: a wrong answer would actually stop you

outcomes.proceed: every asked question cleared by the human, in their own words, after any teaching
outcomes.hold: understanding not demonstrated after ~2-3 focused rounds; do not act
outcomes.redesign: human concludes the action is wrong and changes it; accept on concrete reasoning only

requires: explicit human acceptance of that risk

forbidden: accepting 'I understand' / 'looks good' / 'just do it' as a pass
answering your own comprehension questions then proceeding
generic questions answerable without the repo
reclassifying a missed question as secondary to proceed
over-gating read-only or trivially reversible actions
silent override without naming the unverified risk
